title: skel's client
description: the perfect modpack for QOL features and performance! | 1.21.11 supported!
body:
# the perfect modpack for QOL features and performance!

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e90255e188769e4a9d6282eb7c14bd9b064bd0_0.webp)
## what is skel's client?
skel's client is a minecraft modpack running on fabric that takes the standard vanilla experience and enhances it, whilst making sure to not overdo it and keep things simple. as soon as you load into the game, everything should already look and feel familiar to you!

## what makes skel's client so good?

### updated frequently! (wherever possible)
skel's client is updated frequently with every Minecraft version, wherever possible. the modpack is highly dependent on mod creators updating their mods, so with every new Minecraft version some mods may have to be temporarily removed or completely replaced.

### fully client sided
enjoy zero conflicts with vanilla servers, as this modpack primarily focuses on compatibility with many minecraft servers alongside working consistently with the Essential mod.

### essential support
this modpack comes with Essential, a minecraft mod capable of allowing your friends to join your minecraft worlds without the hassle of setting up a server easily! each mod has been picked out with the primary focus of compatibility with Essential, so enjoy playing with your friends, no matter the client!

_(note: this has been tested with skel's client hosting the world alongside a client with JUST the Essential mod loaded. if your friend is hosting a world on a modded client that may cause conflicts with joining their world, i cannot be of any assistance and that is a problem for you to solve.)_

### controller support (also with handheld support!)
want to or prefer to kick back and relax, without the need of using a keyboard and mouse? skel's client can solve that! thanks to the [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) mod, you can easily hook up a controller to your game and play with nothing else needed to do! you can add custom mod binds and do everything you would usually be able to do, like changing your sensitivity for example.

alongside controller support, this also includes support for handhelds such as the Steam Deck! it does take a little bit of setting up however if you play on an OS such as SteamOS/Bazzite, setup however is very easy to do and you only need to do it once!

### includes automatic AND manual downloads!
skel's client also includes a manual download file with every version as a .zip folder! this basically means you can take this modpack and put it in virtually any launcher! and yes, i'm aware this was possible before, but i'm making it less tedious and time-consuming to do now :p

instructions coming soon!
